required_behaviors: Keep recovery on the transcript page.
Offer one retry only for the failed job and distinguish retrying, success, and failure.

protected_concerns.summary: Retry must not discard or replace the retained source audio.

required_behaviors: Stop implementation until the public principal, scope, expiry, revocation, forwarding, and audit boundary are approved.

protected_concerns.summary: Unauthenticated access changes the workspace data boundary.

EB-D-01.forbidden_inference: A reference screenshot cannot prove that this product needs history, bulk retry, queue controls, or a recovery dashboard.
required_boundary: Inline retry on the failed row

protected_concerns.summary: Retry must preserve input and expose final state.

EB-D-02.forbidden_inference: The existence of administration tabs cannot authorize new channels, schedules, roles, or policy controls.

EI-D-01.forbidden_inference: A generated layout cannot prove that users prefer it or that the timeout flow is usable.

protected_concerns.summary: Timeout cannot be presented as success and must preserve report state.

EI-D-01.expected_resolution: Select the direction with inline timeout and one retry while retaining the stated evidence limitation.

EI-D-02.forbidden_inference: Generated prototypes cannot establish user demand, frequency, preference, or usability.
required_boundary: Keep the existing complete command palette
EI-D-02.expected_resolution: Defer; prototypes cannot close a demand or preference uncertainty.

required_acceptance: Retry exists only in failed state.
Retry preserves filename and changes status to running.
A later completion can become succeeded or failed.
No new route, setting, role, dependency, or tracked behavior artifact.

protected_concerns.summary: Retry must not report completion before the export result arrives.
